3007160.name: Thor's Macros
3007160.description:
Features

- Basic clicker section to automatically click specific keys on your mouse or keyboard
- Customization featuring click randomization, cps, binds, and multi key capability
- Versatile Macro creation menu fueling anything you can imagine
- Custom record and playback binds, along with speed multipliers, and custom loop counts
- Ability to save and load your macros and functions to files for reusing later
- Variables: (String, Number, Vec2D, Vec3D)
- Extensive control flow to compare variables against each other to complete tasks if and when you want them
- The ability to not only save the default variables but read the screen for information
- Instructions: (Wait, Mouse Move, Key Down, Key Up, Mouse Scroll, System Command, Conditionals, Repeats)

With more in development!
